title: Lomariocycas underwoodiana
taxonomy: Lomariocycas underwoodiana is a species of plant within the family Lomariopsidaceae, a group of ferns. The family Lomariopsidaceae is a part of the larger order Polypodiales, which contains many types of ferns. The order Polypodiales is further classified under the class Polypodiopsida, a group of vascular plants. The class Polypodiopsida is part of the division Pteridophyta, which consists of ferns and their allies. This division is a subcategory of the kingdom Plantae, the plant kingdom.
